case_title: LAVONNE DEMSKY et al VS. PLANT INSULATION COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-15-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
